description_long: This is a life-sized bronze bust of a man mounted atop a tall, rectangular marble pedestal. The bust features realistic facial details and short hair, and the pedestal is composed of stacked marble blocks with a stepped base. The front of the pedestal displays an engraved plaque with text, while the rear side has visible graffiti. The sculpture is installed on a patch of bare earth, suggesting an outdoor setting. The overall appearance is solemn and commemorative, with the materials showing signs of weathering. The color palette is dominated by the greenish-brown patina of the bronze and the off-white, slightly stained marble.
description: A bronze bust of a man on a tall marble pedestal with an engraved plaque and visible graffiti, set outdoors on bare earth.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the bronze bust and the full height of the marble pedestal.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the engraved plaque and the detailed facial features of the bust.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile of the bust and pedestal, mirroring view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the bust and pedestal, with visible graffiti on the marble.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a patch of bare earth, likely in a park or public garden.
